case.coils: two circular radius-0.9 m coils at z=+-1 m

adjoint.preconditioner: boundary scale plus shared separable plasma preconditioner

validation.method: central difference of two fully reconverged equilibria

assessment: The supported axisymmetric exterior equilibrium has a matrix-free implicit coil adjoint. End-cut radii and the physical pressure profile are held fixed. The nonaxisymmetric free-boundary derivative lane is deferred with M7.
